standard: Guide to Road Design (Austroads, NZ-adopted) / NZTA supplement
notes: NZ adopts the Austroads Guide to Road Design (AGRD Part 3) as primary authority; the current Austroads guide is login/purchase-gated. NZTA hosts a FREE official document: the State Highway Geometric Design Manual (SHGDM, NZTA, Dec 2000), downloaded in parts. Designated file = Part 2 Basic design criteria (32 pp). Also retrieved and validated 8 more SHGDM parts in this folder: Part 1 intro (14pp), Part 3 design form (8pp), Part 4 horizontal alignment (30pp), Part 5 vertical alignment (16pp), Part 6 cross section (22pp), Part 7 roadside features (36pp), glossary (26pp), appendix A&B (20pp). Part 8 (intersections) was a 27KB stub that failed validation and was deleted. All from official nzta.govt.nz/assets. NZTA also lists supplementary technical memoranda TM2501 (superelevation), TM2502 (water run-off), TM2503 (edge protection/medians). SECOND PASS (2026-06-14): attempted to retrieve the three free NZ-specific TM supplements/overrides to Austroads. Official direct-PDF URLs resolved on nzta.govt.nz: TM2501 https://www.nzta.govt.nz/assets/resources/superelevation-calculations/docs/tm2501.pdf ; TM2502 https://www.nzta.govt.nz/assets/resources/calculating-road-surface-water-run-off/docs/tm2502.pdf ; TM2503 https://www.nzta.govt.nz/assets/resources/dual-carriageway-safe-system/docs/dual-carriageway-safe-system.pdf . All three could NOT be auto-downloaded: the nzta.govt.nz origin is behind an Imperva/Incapsula bot wall that returns a JavaScript challenge (212/~880-byte HTML stub) or HTTP 403 for these un-cached assets; curl cannot solve the JS challenge (tried plain curl, full browser headers+Referer, homepage-warmed cookie jar with 12-attempt backoff loop, asset-own challenge-cookie replay, and header-only trace = 403). The already-harvested SHGDM PDFs still download because they are warm in the Incapsula edge cache. Outcome for the TMs = needs_manual: download the three URLs above in a real JS-capable browser (free, no login) and validate with _tools/validate_pdf.py. CORE AUSTROADS AGRD (Part 2 Design Considerations, Part 3 Geometric Design Ed 3.4 2021, Part 4/4A/4B/4C Intersections) remains PAID/LOGIN on austroads.gov.au (anonymous fetch = HTTP 403) -> BUY_LIST; free to NZ local authorities via NZTA's Austroads membership (austroadsguides@nzta.govt.nz). Not downloaded.
